title: Crime-State Overlap Share Kit
label: Crime system share pack
summary: Share-ready copy for cartels, mafia logistics, sanctions, court records, finance, and corruption overlap.
boundary: Share copy is a gateway. It does not replace the evidence route, trust route, or source boundary.
hooks: Organized crime is not just violence. It is logistics, finance, ports, companies, and silence.
Follow the money, then follow the paperwork.
The map is where street crime meets state failure.
shortPosts: The Crime-State Overlap Pack maps court records, sanctions, ports, laundering, cartel routes, mafia structures, and corruption boundaries.
If you only watch the arrests, you miss the architecture. Crime networks survive through logistics and finance.
threadOutline: Open with logistics over street violence.
Explain why court records and sanctions need different labels.
Show the archive routes: maps, books, evidence lanes.
Send readers to the crime-state pack.
videoCaption: The real crime map is not a mugshot wall. It is finance, logistics, ports, corruption, and records.
